# VERDICT Engine

> Framework specification and operations governance for VERDICT, an
> independent AI agent trust evaluation index. This repo holds the
> evaluation framework and operations docs; evaluation reports and the
> dataset live in the verdict-platforms repo.

## Authority order

canonical (this repo, for framework/ops spec) > compiled brief >
Project Knowledge bootstrap. On divergence, this repo's files win.

## Framework specification (stable core)

- [ENGINE.md](ENGINE.md): the VERDICT evaluation framework (v0.3.1).
- [QA.md](QA.md): QA protocol and Operations Override Rules.
- [KNOWN_FACTS.md](KNOWN_FACTS.md): entity facts applied during evaluation.

## Operations governance docs

- [operations_workflow_v2.md](docs/operations_workflow_v2.md): context-volume
  sustainability design (Option C / D).
- [operations_session_sop.md](docs/operations_session_sop.md)
- [operations_sync_automation_proposal.md](docs/operations_sync_automation_proposal.md)
- [operations_override_log.md](docs/operations_override_log.md): institutional
  override registry.
- [deploy_status.md](docs/deploy_status.md): canonical deployed-platform record.

## Notes

- Confidential strategy material is NOT in this repo and is never
  auto-fetched. It is held outside the public repositories entirely.
